commercialRule: For each signed-in email, Inventra seeds that email's cloud workspace from the first laptop with real data when the cloud is empty; other laptops pull that same workspace and all saves push/pull automatically every few seconds.
releaseNotes: Fixes same-email login showing no products/data on another laptop after the account works.
If the cloud workspace for that email is empty and this laptop has real data, the laptop safely seeds the cloud master for that email only.
If a new laptop signs in and cloud has data, it pulls the cloud workspace before local empty data can overwrite it.
Adds live sync polling every few seconds plus push-on-save for products, suppliers, orders, stock, users, settings, and app state.
Adds safety local backup before applying cloud state.
Includes required Supabase SQL for ensure_workspace, pull_state, and push_state_v1032.
No SQL is run automatically by the patch; run the copied SQL once in Supabase SQL Editor.
No local app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, account logic, or updater logic is deleted.
